item.title: [信号 7.0] 移动电源 CCC 认证将新增安全测试要求
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 7.0

市场监管总局调整移动电源等产品CCC认证规则，新增GB 47372—2026为认证依据并强化热滥用、针刺等安全测试，设过渡期至2027年3月31日后全面执行。

Tags: #CCC认证, #电池安全, #移动电源, #GB 47372-2026, #合规监管

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Cloudflare Turnstile requiring fingerprintable WebGL
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 6.0

The article and HN discussion report that Cloudflare Turnstile’s bot checks effectively require fingerprintable WebGL characteristics, creating privacy concerns and breaking access for some browsers/users.

Tags: #web-security, #browser-fingerprinting, #cloudflare, #privacy, #anti-bot

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Dav2d
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 6.0

The post and HN thread discuss dav2d and the broader challenge of making AV2 decoding practical, given much higher complexity than AV1 and uncertain real-world performance tradeoffs versus compression gains.

Tags: #video-codecs, #AV2, #software-decoding, #performance-optimization, #systems-engineering

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 研究称恶意网站可借 SSD 计时推测用户活动
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 6.0

研究提出 FROST 无交互攻击，恶意网站可通过浏览器 OPFS 与 SSD 计时侧信道推测用户正在访问的网站和使用的应用。

Tags: #Side-channel Attacks, #Browser Security, #Web Privacy, #OPFS, #SSD Timing

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 1-Bit Bonsai Image 4B Image Generation for Local Devices
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

PrismML presents “1-Bit Bonsai Image 4B,” a heavily quantized image-generation model intended to make large diffusion-style generation feasible on local devices.

Tags: #generative-ai, #diffusion-models, #model-quantization, #on-device-ml, #efficient-inference

Read original

item.title: [信号 5.0] Restartable Sequences
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 5.0

Explains Linux rseq() restartable sequences as a kernel-assisted way to execute short critical sections without mutexes or atomics while preserving scheduler abstraction, with notes on practical usage via librseq.

Tags: #linux, #concurrency, #systems-programming, #performance, #lock-free

Read original

item.title: [信号 5.0] Deflock hits 100k ALPRs Mapped in USA
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 5.0

Deflock reports mapping 100,000 automated license plate readers in the U.S., sparking discussion about surveillance scope, legality, and dataset accuracy.

Tags: #privacy, #surveillance, #ALPR, #open-data, #civic-tech

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] The Website Specification
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 4.0

A checklist-style “Website Specification” outlining recommended/required web best practices, sparking debate about AI/agent-oriented guidance and practical implementation details (e.g., login form UX and security norms).

Tags: #web-development, #web-standards, #security, #best-practices, #ai-agents

Read original
